comment: Perenco have requested to collect the leak detection tool's on Friday. They will arrive from Archer shortly and be tested tomorrow along with our QPC's and PRT's in preparation for the loadout.

project: PRJ03270 - Archer - Archer - Blackburn - Unknown Well - Rental
comment: Archer collected 2 x RBT'S and 4 x PRC041'S on 14th April - SHI04293. The rental period is expected to be around 1 week.
Perenco are planning to do this job next Wednesday. Engineer to travel on Tuesday 21st

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment:
Continue Rig up on HBA-02
Pack read container as they plan to reorganise the deck to make space for e-line kit arriving this week

project: PRJ03244 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - 9850 - SSD (ZeroTime / X-Y)
comment: Further delays due to flooding in the field. possibly the 20th for mobilising.

project: PRJ03277 - Perenco - Wytch Farm - F-02 - MFC
comment: Job completed travel to London around 9:00 am departing from hotel ETA 12:00 the return car and go to airport

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment:
SLB waiting on data from Well explorer to before rigging down off HBA-21 and moving to HBA-2
Plan today perform 1hr test on all batteries to ensure all remaining batteries are working and acceptable to run on next well

project: PRJ03277 - Perenco - Wytch Farm - F-02 - MFC
comment: Data handed it to the client. Data ok. Now preparing backload. Fit checks pending to do. Only for the MFC60 and the PRCs Pendign to get return ticket.
